name: cloud-sql-mysql
description: Connect and interact with a Cloud SQL for MySQL database and data.

cloud_sql_mysql_project.title: Project ID
cloud_sql_mysql_project.description: ID of the Google Cloud project

cloud_sql_mysql_region.title: Region
cloud_sql_mysql_region.description: Region of the Cloud SQL instance

cloud_sql_mysql_instance.title: Instance Name
cloud_sql_mysql_instance.description: Name of the Cloud SQL instance

cloud_sql_mysql_user.title: Database User
cloud_sql_mysql_user.description: (Optional) Username of the database user (Default: IAM user)

cloud_sql_mysql_password.title: Database Password
cloud_sql_mysql_password.description: (Optional) Password of the database user (Default: IAM user)

cloud_sql_mysql_ip_type.title: IP Type
cloud_sql_mysql_ip_type.description: (Optional) Type of the IP address: PUBLIC, PRIVATE, or PSC (Default: Public)
